app.name: LegalLens
app.title: AI-Powered Legal Helper for India
app.welcomeSubtitle: AI-powered legal assistant helping Indian lawyers and citizens navigate the transition from IPC/CrPC/IEA to BNS/BNSS/BSA.

home.legalResearchDesc: Ask questions about Indian criminal law with AI-powered citations
home.compareLawsDesc: See IPC ↔ BNS section mappings with highlighted changes
home.draftDocumentsDesc: AI-assisted legal document drafting with templates
home.analyzeDocumentsDesc: Upload FIRs and court orders for AI analysis
home.lawNotice: July 2024: India's new criminal laws (BNS, BNSS, BSA) are now in effect, replacing IPC, CrPC, and IEA.

research.title: Legal Research
research.subtitle: AI-powered Q&A with legal citations
research.askQuestionDesc: Get AI-powered answers about Indian criminal law with citations from BNS, BNSS, BSA (and old laws IPC, CrPC, IEA).
research.sample1: What is the punishment for murder under BNS?
research.sample3: What are the bail provisions in BNSS?

documents.title: Document Analysis
documents.subtitle: Upload FIRs, court orders, and legal documents for AI-powered analysis
documents.dropFiles: Drop files here or click to upload
documents.supportedFormats: Supports PDF, images (JPG, PNG), and Word documents

drafting.title: Legal Drafting
drafting.subtitle: AI-assisted legal document drafting with BNS/BNSS/BSA compliance
drafting.selectTemplateDesc: Choose a document template from the sidebar to start drafting
drafting.placeholder: Click 'Generate Draft' to create a document, or start typing...
drafting.bailApplicationDesc: Application for regular/anticipatory bail under BNSS
